layers.title: Coal Mineral Resources
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 1,220 coalfield areas and coal mineral resource occurrences in China stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Resources_Coal" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Dams
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 1,541 dams in China stored as points in the layer "CHN_Infra_Dams" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Electrical Power Generating Stations
layers.summary: Power generation facilities in Africa stored as points in the feature class "CHN_Infra_Power_Stations" for use in a geographic information system (GIS). This dataset includes only facilities that were idle, in operation or in rehabilitation in 2021.

layers.title: Electrical Power Transmission Infrastructure
layers.summary: Extra high voltage and ultra high voltage power transmission lines in China stored as polylines in the feature class "CHN_Infra_Power_Transmission" for use in a geographic information system (GIS). This dataset includes transmission lines that were completed (excludes planned and under-construction) and online in 2018.

layers.title: Infrastructure Mineral Commodity Exporting Ports
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 374 mineral exporting maritime ports in China stored as points in the feature class "CHN_Infra_Transport_Ports" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) Terminals
layers.summary: Natural gas import/regasification in China stored as points in the feature class "CHN_Infra_OG_LNG_Terminals" for use in a geographic information system (GIS). This dataset includes only facilities that were in operation or had idle capacity in 2021.

layers.title: Major and Critical Mineral Deposits
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 280 major and critical mineral deposits in China stored as points in the layer "CHN_Mineral_Deposits" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Exploration
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 386 mineral exploration sites in China stored as points in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Exploration" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Facilities
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 2,424 fuel and non-fuel mineral production and processing operations in China stored as points in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Facilities" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Antimony
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 3 permissive tracts for undiscovered antimony resources in China stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Resources_Antimony" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Copper
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 20 permissive tracts for undiscovered porphyry and sediment-hosted copper resources in China stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Resources_Copper" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Phosphate
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 248 permissive tracts for the occurrence and potential deposits of phosphate in China stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Resources_Phosphate" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Potash
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 4 permissive tracts for undiscovered deposits of evaporite-related potash in China stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_Mineral_Resources_Potash" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Recoverable Resources and Cumulative Production
layers.summary: Geospatial, cumulative production, and recoverable conventional and continuous resource data for oil- and gas-producing regions in China stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_OG_Resources_Recoverable" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources by Province Groups, Conventional
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable conventional hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of China assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_OG_Province_Groups_Conventional" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources, Continuous
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable continuous hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of China assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_OG_Provinces_Continuous" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources, Conventional
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable conventional hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of China assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "CHN_OG_Provinces_Conventional" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Coal Mineral Resources
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 118 coalfield areas and coal mineral resource occurrences in Bangladesh, Bhutan, Malaysia, New Zealand, Philippines, South Korea (Republic of Korea), Taiwan, and Vietnam stored as polygons in the feature class "INDOPAC_Mineral_Resources_Coal" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Development
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 285 fuel and non-fuel mineral production and processing sites under development in Bangladesh, Bhutan, Brunei, Burma, Fiji, Malaysia, Mongolia, New Caledonia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, Singapore, Solomon Islands, South Korea (Republic of Korea), Sri Lanka, Taiwan, and Vietnam stored as points in the feature class "INDOPAC_Mineral_Development" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Exploration
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 884 mineral exploration sites in Bangladesh, Bhutan, Brunei, Burma, Fiji, Malaysia, Mongolia, New Caledonia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Islands, South Korea (Republic of Korea), Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Timor-Leste, and Vietnam stored as points in the feature class "INDOPAC_Mineral_Exploration" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Production and Processing Facilities
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 1,573 fuel and non-fuel mineral production and processing operations in Indo-Pacific nations defined as Bangladesh, Bhutan, Brunei, Burma, Fiji, Malaysia, Mongolia, Nauru, New Caledonia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, Singapore, Solomon Islands, South Korea (Republic of Korea), Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Timor-Leste, and Vietnam stored as points in the feature class "INDOPAC_Mineral_Facilities" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Copper
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 34 permissive tracts for undiscovered porphyry and sediment-hosted copper resources in Burma, Fiji, Malaysia, Mongolia, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, Singapore, South Korea (Republic of Korea), Taiwan, and Vietnam stored as polygons in the feature class "INDOPAC_Mineral_Resources_Copper" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Recoverable Resources and Cumulative Production
layers.summary: Geospatial, cumulative production, and recoverable conventional and continuous hydrocarbon resource data for oil- and gas-producing regions in Bangladesh, Brunei, Burma, Malaysia, Mongolia, New Caledonia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea, Philippines, South Korea (Republic of Korea), Sri Lanka, Taiwan, Timor-Leste, and Vietnam stored as polygons in the feature class "INDOPAC_OG_Resources_Recoverable" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources, Continuous
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable continuous hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of Mongolia assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "INDOPAC_OG_Provinces_Continuous" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources, Conventional
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable conventional hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of select Indo-Pacific countries assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "INDOPAC_OG_Provinces_Conventional" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Exploration
layers.summary: Mineral exploration sites of Latin America and the Caribbean.

layers.title: Mineral Facilities
layers.summary: Mineral facilities of Latin America and the Caribbean.

layers.title: Transport Ports
layers.summary: Mineral commodity exporting ports of Latin America and the Caribbean.

layers.title: Africa Infrastructure Mineral Commodity Exporting Ports
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 220 mineral exporting maritime and dry ports in Afghanistan, Cambodia, India, Indonesia, Iran, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as points in the feature class "SWA_Infra_Transport_Ports" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Electrical Power Generating Stations
layers.summary: Power generation facilities in Afghanistan, Cambodia, India, Indonesia, Iran, Laos, Nepal, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as points in the feature class "SWA_Infra_Power_Stations" for use in a geographic information system (GIS). This dataset includes facilities that were idle, in operation or in rehabilitation in 2019.

layers.title: Electrical Power Transmission Infrastructure
layers.summary: Power transmission lines in Afghanistan, Cambodia, India, Indonesia, Iran, Laos, Nepal, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as polylines in the feature class "SWA_Infra_Power_Transmission" for use in a geographic information system (GIS). This dataset includes transmission lines that were completed (excludes planned and under-construction) and online in 2019.

layers.title: Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) Terminals
layers.summary: Natural gas import/regasification and export/liquefaction facilities in India, Indonesia, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as points in the feature class "SWA_Infra_OG_LNG_Terminals" for use in a geographic information system (GIS). This dataset includes facilities that were in operation, in development, or had idle capacity in 2018.

layers.title: Major and Critical Mineral Deposits
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 2,077 major and critical mineral deposits in Afghanistan, Cambodia, India, Indonesia, Iran, Laos, Nepal, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as points in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Deposits" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Exploration
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 318 mineral exploration sites in Afghanistan, Cambodia, India, Indonesia, Iran, Laos, Nepal, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as points in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Exploration" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Production and Processing Facilities
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 1,968 fuel and non-fuel mineral mineral processing plants in Southwest Asian nations defined as Afghanistan, Cambodia, Laos, India, Indonesia, Iran, Nepal, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as points in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Facilities" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Copper
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 49 permissive tracts for undiscovered porphyry and sediment-hosted copper resources in Afghanistan, Cambodia, India, Indonesia, Iran, Laos, North Korea, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Resources_Copper" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Phosphate
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 11,657 permissive tracts for undiscovered phosphate resources in Afghanistan, India, Iran, and Pakistan stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Resources_Phosphate" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Mineral Resource Assessment of Potash
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 10 permissive tracts for undiscovered deposits of evaporite-related potash in Afghanistan, India, Iran, Laos, Pakistan, and Thailand stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Resources_Potash" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Recoverable Resources and Cumulative Production
layers.summary: Geospatial, cumulative production, and recoverable conventional and continuous resource data for oil- and gas-producing nations in southwest Asia countries stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_OG_Resources_Recoverable" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources, Continuous
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable continuous hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of southwest Asia countries assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_OG_Provinces_Continuous" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Oil & Gas Undiscovered Resources, Conventional
layers.summary: Geospatial and total mean volume data for undiscovered, technically recoverable conventional hydrocarbon resources in geologic provinces of southwest Asia countries assessed by the USGS, stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_OG_Provinces_Conventional" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).

layers.title: Undiscovered Coal Mineral Resources
layers.summary: Geospatial and descriptive data for 156 major coal mineral resource occurrences in Afghanistan, India, Indonesia, Iran, North Korea, and Pakistan stored as polygons in the feature class "SWA_Mineral_Resources_Coal" for use in a geographic information system (GIS).
